items.original: Expose POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/documents/generate exactly as specified.
items.canonical: Implement POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/documents/generate exactly per the specified API contract.

items.original: Expose POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/documents/{documentId}/review exactly as specified.
items.canonical: Implement POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/documents/{documentId}/review exactly per the specified API contract.

items.original: Return only tenant-scoped templates and ensure currentVersion reflects the latest effective template version.
items.canonical: Restrict template listing to tenant-scoped templates and set currentVersion to the latest effective template version.

items.original: Create AuditLog records for every successful and failed review action evaluation, including before and after review status, reason/comments, correlation id, and failure outcome when no mutation occurs.
items.canonical: Persist AuditLog for every review evaluation outcome (success and failure), including before/after status, reason/comments, correlation id, and no-mutation failure outcome.

items.original: On persistence failure after file upload, roll back metadata changes and mark orphaned files for cleanup by background process.
items.canonical: On post-upload persistence failure, roll back metadata changes and enqueue orphaned files for background cleanup.

items.original: Do not invent external provider request or response contracts beyond the documented statement that the external dependency contract is not specified by provided official documentation.
items.canonical: Remove inferred external-provider request/response contracts and keep behavior within the documented unspecified external dependency contract.

items.original: Add API contract tests for exact method and path coverage of all 4 scoped endpoints.
items.canonical: Add API contract tests that verify exact HTTP method and path for all 4 scoped endpoints.

items.original: API-05 All list endpoints support pagination (limit/offset or cursor): GET /api/v1/admin/templates returns an unbounded list with no pagination query parameters or pagination metadata; add validated paging inputs and bounded queries.
items.canonical: Add pagination to GET /api/v1/admin/templates with validated parameters and bounded query results.

items.original: PERF-04 Response payloads are bounded — no unbounded queries returning all rows: template listing currently returns all tenant templates at once; enforce server-side page limits and default/max page size.
items.canonical: Enforce bounded template-list responses with server-side pagination and default/max page-size limits.

items.original: TEST-06A LLD coverage is verified — generated code is checked against approved Low-Level Design: implementation is not fully aligned with provided component spec flows (notably endpoint contract mismatch for document generation/review paths and a queued branding orphaned-file-cleanup job type without a corresponding worker handler); align routes/flows and add traceable tests.
items.canonical: Align implementation with approved LLD flows by fixing document generation/review endpoint contract mismatches and adding a worker handler for queued branding orphaned-file cleanup, then add traceable tests.

items.original: CODE-02 No hardcoded values — magic numbers, strings, URLs, timeouts, and schedules are in constants or config: operational literals (job statuses/types/priorities, retry and timeout values, role/permission strings) are still embedded in service logic; centralize them in configuration/constants.
items.canonical: Move operational literals (job statuses/types/priorities, retry/timeout values, role/permission strings) from service logic into configuration/constants.

items.original: Expose POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/documents/generate exactly as specified.
items.canonical: Implement POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/documents/generate exactly per the specified API contract.

items.original: Expose POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/documents/{documentId}/review exactly as specified.
items.canonical: Implement POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/documents/{documentId}/review exactly per the specified API contract.

items.original: X-Tenant-Id header is mandatory and must resolve to an active tenant context.
items.canonical: Require X-Tenant-Id on requests and validate it resolves to an active tenant context.

items.original: Render the document, generate footer version text where supported, and compute checksumSha256 for the rendered file.
items.canonical: Render documents, add supported footer version text, and compute checksumSha256 for the rendered output.

items.original: Do not invent external provider request or response contracts beyond the documented statement that the external dependency contract is not specified by provided official documentation.
items.canonical: Remove inferred external-provider request/response contracts and keep behavior within the documented unspecified external dependency contract.

items.original: Add API contract tests for exact method and path coverage of all 4 scoped endpoints.
items.canonical: Add API contract tests that verify exact HTTP method and path for all 4 scoped endpoints.

items.original: Add header validation tests covering required and optional headers exactly as specified for each endpoint.
items.canonical: Add header validation tests for required and optional headers exactly as specified per endpoint.

items.original: API-05 List endpoints support pagination (limit/offset or cursor): `GET /api/v1/admin/templates` has no pagination query parameters or bounded page-size enforcement; add `limit`/`offset` (or cursor) handling with validated bounds in controller/service/repository.
items.canonical: Add pagination to GET /api/v1/admin/templates with validated parameters and bounded query results.

items.original: PERF-04 Response payloads are bounded — no unbounded queries returning all rows: admin template listing currently returns the full tenant template set without pagination limits; enforce server-side paging and maximum page size.
items.canonical: Enforce bounded template-list responses with server-side pagination and default/max page-size limits.

items.original: SEC-02 Rate limiting is applied to authentication and public endpoints: `TenantRateLimitMiddleware` bypasses limiting when `X-Tenant-Id` is missing, so anonymous/auth flows such as `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh` can avoid throttling; add an IP/client-based fallback limiter for requests without tenant context.
items.canonical: Apply fallback IP/client rate limiting when X-Tenant-Id is missing so endpoints like POST /api/v1/auth/refresh cannot bypass throttling.

items.original: SEC-06 Dependencies are pinned and free of known critical CVEs: lockfiles and CI vulnerability-gate logic exist, but current dependency vulnerability status was not verifiable in this workspace (`dotnet` CLI unavailable); run `dotnet list AeonDocGen.slnx package --vulnerable --include-transitive --format json` in an executable environment and confirm zero critical CVEs.
items.canonical: Run dependency vulnerability scanning (`dotnet list AeonDocGen.slnx package --vulnerable --include-transitive --format json`) in an environment with dotnet and verify zero critical CVEs.

items.original: Expose POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/documents/generate exactly as specified.
items.canonical: Implement POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/documents/generate exactly per the specified API contract.

items.original: Expose POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/documents/{documentId}/review exactly as specified.
items.canonical: Implement POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/documents/{documentId}/review exactly per the specified API contract.

items.original: Require authenticated access with Authorization and X-Tenant-Id and enforce project-level authorization for document generation.
items.canonical: Enforce authenticated access with Authorization and X-Tenant-Id, plus project-level authorization for document generation.

items.original: Render the document, generate footer version text where supported, and compute checksumSha256 for the rendered file.
items.canonical: Render documents, add supported footer version text, and compute checksumSha256 for the rendered output.

items.original: Create AuditLog records for every successful and failed review action evaluation, including before and after review status, reason/comments, correlation id, and failure outcome when no mutation occurs.
items.canonical: Persist AuditLog for every review evaluation outcome (success and failure), including before/after status, reason/comments, correlation id, and no-mutation failure outcome.

items.original: Execute validation, state update, review event insertion, and audit log persistence in a single database transaction with rollback on any failure.
items.canonical: Execute review validation, state update, review event insertion, and audit-log persistence in one transaction with rollback on any failure.

items.original: Do not invent external provider request or response contracts beyond the documented statement that the external dependency contract is not specified by provided official documentation.
items.canonical: Remove inferred external-provider request/response contracts and keep behavior within the documented unspecified external dependency contract.

items.original: Add API contract tests for exact method and path coverage of all 4 scoped endpoints.
items.canonical: Add API contract tests that verify exact HTTP method and path for all 4 scoped endpoints.

items.original: Add header validation tests covering required and optional headers exactly as specified for each endpoint.
items.canonical: Add header validation tests for required and optional headers exactly as specified per endpoint.

items.original: List endpoints support pagination (limit/offset or cursor) — add pagination parameters and enforce page-bounded query execution for template listing.
items.canonical: Add pagination to GET /api/v1/admin/templates with validated parameters and bounded query results.

items.original: Response payloads are bounded — no unbounded queries returning all rows — apply default/max page size and return only bounded template results.
items.canonical: Enforce bounded template-list responses with server-side pagination and default/max page-size limits.

items.original: LLD coverage is verified — generated code is checked against the approved Low-Level Design to confirm all required modules, flows, interfaces, validations, and edge cases are implemented — align document generation/review endpoint contracts with the approved component spec paths and close the resulting traceability gap.
items.canonical: Align document generation/review endpoint contracts with approved LLD component-spec paths and add traceable coverage for the resulting gap.

items.original: Sensitive data (passwords, tokens, PII) is not logged — stop logging Idempotency-Key values and redact token-like identifiers from service logs.
items.canonical: Stop logging Idempotency-Key values and redact token-like identifiers from service logs.

items.original: Alerts or notifications are triggered on repeated job failures — integrate JobFailureAlert escalation with an actual notification channel (for example webhook/email/incident system), not only DB persistence.
items.canonical: Integrate JobFailureAlert escalation with a real notification channel (webhook/email/incident system), not only DB persistence.

items.original: File path traversal is prevented in any file-serving or file-reading logic — harden BrandingStorageClient/DocumentStorageClient path canonicalization to reject rooted/drive-qualified inputs and enforce base-path containment checks.
items.canonical: Harden BrandingStorageClient and DocumentStorageClient path canonicalization to reject rooted/drive-qualified inputs and enforce base-path containment checks.
